title: Test on common device sizes
description:
Verify layout on key viewport sizes.

## Viewports to test
- iPhone SE (375px)
- iPhone 14 Pro (393px)
- iPad Mini (768px)
- iPad Pro (1024px)
- Desktop (1280px+)

## Test in
- Chrome DevTools device emulation
- Safari responsive design mode

title: Ensure semantic HTML structure
description:
Use proper semantic elements throughout.

## Elements to use
- header, main, footer
- h1 (single, for podcast title)
- h2 for section headings
- nav if navigation added
- article/section as appropriate

## Avoid
- Divs for everything
- Skipping heading levels

title: 🧹 Project Cleanup & Setup
description:
Remove existing site assets and set up fresh project infrastructure.

## Scope
- Delete all existing page components and assets
- Clean up unused dependencies
- Set up new project structure
- Configure development environment

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All existing src/pages/ content removed
- [ ] All existing src/components/ content removed  
- [ ] Public assets cleaned up
- [ ] package.json updated with testing dependencies
- [ ] TypeScript configured (optional but recommended)
- [ ] ESLint/Prettier configured for new project

description: The shooting star animation and typewriter effect should respect user's motion preferences. Provide static alternatives when reduced motion is preferred.

description: Ensure the storybook works well on tablets and phones for kids
close_reason: Closing - replacing storybook with podcast site

title: Implement theme context and system preference detection
description:
Create React context for theme management.

## Features
- Detect system color-scheme preference (prefers-color-scheme)
- Listen for system preference changes
- Persist user preference in localStorage
- Provide theme state to components

## API
```jsx
const { theme, toggleTheme, setTheme } = useTheme()
```

title: Add npm scripts for CI commands

title: Verify color contrast meets WCAG AA
description:
Audit all color combinations for accessibility.

## Requirements
- Normal text: 4.5:1 contrast ratio
- Large text: 3:1 contrast ratio
- UI components: 3:1 contrast ratio

## Tools
- WebAIM contrast checker
- Chrome DevTools accessibility audit
- axe DevTools extension

## Check both
- Light mode
- Dark mode

description: Current alt text is minimal (e.g., 'Piper the unicorn'). Add descriptive context-appropriate alt text that helps screen reader users understand the scene.

title: 📱 Mobile Responsiveness
description:
Ensure the landing page works beautifully across all device sizes.

## Breakpoints (Tailwind defaults)
- Mobile: < 640px (default)
- sm: 640px
- md: 768px
- lg: 1024px
- xl: 1280px

## Approach
Mobile-first design, enhance for larger screens.

## Key Considerations
- Touch targets minimum 44px
- Readable text without zooming
- No horizontal scrolling
- Proper spacing on all sizes

- author

## Implementation
Add as script tag in index.html or inject via React Helmet

title: 🎙️ Norah's Notes Podcast Landing Page
description:
Complete rebuild of norahtashner.com as a landing page for the Norah's Notes Podcast.

## Overview
A minimal MVP landing page featuring:
- Hero section with podcast description
- Embedded Spotify player
- Subscribe button (Spotify only)

## Design Goals
- Playful & colorful visual style matching the family-friendly podcast
- Light/dark mode with system preference detection + toggle
- Mobile-first responsive design (standard Tailwind breakpoints)

## Technical Stack
- React 19 + Vite + Tailwind CSS (existing stack)
- Vitest + React Testing Library (80% coverage target)
- GitHub Actions CI → GitHub Pages deployment

## Quality Standards
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility
- Full SEO setup (meta tags, Open Graph, structured data)
- No analytics for MVP

title: Move inline styles to CSS modules or styled components
description: Currently most styling is inline in JSX. Migrate to CSS modules or a consistent styling approach for better maintainability.

title: Add loading state while scene images load
description: Add a loading indicator or skeleton screen while background and character images load to prevent layout shift and blank screens.
close_reason: Closing - storybook feature not needed

title: 🎨 Design System & Theming
description:
Establish the visual design system for Norah's Notes Podcast landing page.

## Design Style
Playful & colorful - bright colors, fun feel, child-friendly aesthetic that matches the family podcast vibe.

## Scope
- Color palette definition (light & dark modes)
- Typography system
- Tailwind theme configuration
- Theme toggle component
- System preference detection

## References
- Podcast artwork from Spotify for color inspiration
- Target: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast

title: Add focus indicators for keyboard navigation
description:
Ensure visible focus states on all interactive elements.

## Requirements
- All focusable elements have visible focus ring
- Focus ring meets contrast requirements
- Custom focus styles match design
- Don't remove outline without replacement

## Elements to check
- Theme toggle button
- Subscribe button
- Skip link
- Any other interactive elements

title: Implement responsive Hero section layout

Make Hero section work across all breakpoints.

- Side-by-side layout
- Artwork on left, text on right
- Balanced proportions

- Meta tags (title, description)

- robots.txt

## Accessibility
- WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
- Semantic HTML
- Keyboard navigation
- Screen reader support
- Color contrast

3. Unit Tests (Vitest)
4. Build (Vite)
5. Deploy (GitHub Pages)

## Triggers
- Pull Requests: run tests, lint, build
- Push to main: full pipeline + deploy

## Coverage
- Enforce 80% coverage threshold
